form.formComment: Quickly away at Murray Bridge two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at Murray Bridge last start over 680m. Form from this draw is very strong, including two wins. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 3.5 lengths over 520m at this track (30.10). In-form and measures right up. Hard to beat.
